data.title: Announcing Lumi's Utopia 2026 Drawing Contest
data.description: In East Meadow, New York on March 30, 2026, LuminoCity Festival (LuminoCity) and the Long Island Children's Museum (LICM) have revealed the comeback of the widely anticipated Lumi's Utopia children's art competition. This annual event is marking its sixth year and promises exciting opportunities for young artists to showcase their talents. The festival is set to include various interactive installations and creative activities, providing a platform for children to explore their imaginative skills.

data.title: CorVista Health Demonstrates High-Sensitivity for Noninvasive Detection of CAD including INOCA (Ischemia with No Obstructed Coronary Arteries) at ACC.26
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, CorVista Health, a top provider of noninvasive cardiovascular diagnostics, revealed recent findings on a machine-learning model that detects cardiac ischemia using physiologic signals. The data was disclosed at the American College of Cardiology’s Annual Scientific Session (ACC.26) in New Orleans from March 28 to 30, 2026. The study, titled "Noninvasive Ischemia Detection in Symptomatic Patients: A Physiologic Feature Machine-Learned Model," showcased the efficacy of the model in identifying cardiac ischemia in patients.

data.title: Georgian Secures $100M Strategic Investment From Navigator Global
data.description: A growth equity firm specializing in AI, Georgian (Georgian.io), disclosed a significant strategic investment of USD $100 million from Navigator Global Investments Limited (ASX: NGI) on March 30, 2026. In conjunction with this funding, Navigator Global Investments (NGI) now holds a 4.5% stake in the company.

data.title: $2.5M Pietri family gift to benefit College of Engineering & Computer Science
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, on March 30, 2026, the University of Tulsa shared news of a significant donation. The donation, amounting to $2.5 million, comes from Antonio J. Pietri (Class of '87), a notable alumnus in chemical engineering, and his wife, Sabine. This generous contribution is intended to support the College of Engineering & Computer Science at the university.

data.title: FERRARI N.V.: PERIODIC REPORT ON THE BUYBACK PROGRAM
data.description: Ferrari N.V. has announced the purchase of Euro 250 million worth of common shares as part of a larger share buyback program totaling approximately Euro 3.5 billion planned to be completed by 2030. This initial tranche of the buyback program was disclosed during the 2025 Capital Markets Day. The shares were acquired on both the Euronext Milan (EXM) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE). The company aims to continue this multi-year buyback program until 2030.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up On Iran News; Powell Due As Software, Miners Shine (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced an increase on Monday in response to the recent U.S.-Iran conflict updates. Federal Reserve Chair Powell is scheduled to address the market shortly after opening. Today's stock market saw notable improvements with the Dow rising, while software and mining sectors showed strong performance.
